title: Cursor Guard Configuration
description: Controls which files are protected, backup strategy, secrets filtering, and retention policy for the cursor-guard skill.

protect.description: Whitelist glob patterns relative to workspace root. Only matching files get backup protection. If empty or missing, all files are protected.

ignore.description: Blacklist glob patterns. Matching files are excluded even if they match 'protect'. Applied on top of .gitignore.

backup_strategy.description: Primary backup method: 'git' (local commits), 'shadow' (.cursor-guard-backup/ copies), or 'both'.

auto_backup_interval_seconds.description: Interval in seconds for auto-backup script to check for changes.

secrets_patterns.description: Glob patterns for sensitive files auto-excluded from backups. Overrides built-in defaults: .env, .env.*, *.key, *.pem, *.p12, *.pfx, credentials*. Use secrets_patterns_extra to add without replacing.

secrets_patterns_extra.description: Additional glob patterns appended to secrets_patterns (including defaults). Use this to add patterns without losing built-in protection.

pre_restore_backup.description: 'always' (default): automatically preserve current version before every restore. 'ask': prompt the user each time to choose whether to preserve. 'never': skip preservation entirely (not recommended).

retention.description: Controls automatic cleanup of old shadow-copy snapshots.

mode.description: 'days': keep snapshots from the last N days. 'count': keep N newest snapshots. 'size': keep total size under N MB.

days.description: Number of days to retain snapshots (when mode='days').

max_count.description: Maximum number of snapshots to keep (when mode='count').

max_size_mb.description: Maximum total size in MB for shadow copies (when mode='size').

git_retention.description: Controls automatic cleanup of old commits on refs/guard/auto-backup.

enabled.description: Enable automatic pruning of old auto-backup commits. Default false (manual cleanup).

mode.description: 'days': keep commits from the last N days. 'count': keep N newest commits.

days.description: Number of days to keep auto-backup commits (when mode='days').

max_count.description: Maximum number of auto-backup commits to keep (when mode='count').

proactive_alert.description: Enable V4 proactive change-velocity detection. When true, the auto-backup watcher monitors file change frequency and raises alerts when abnormal patterns are detected.

alert_thresholds.description: Thresholds for proactive change-velocity alerts (V4). Only effective when proactive_alert is true.

files_per_window.description: Number of file changes within the time window that triggers an alert.

window_seconds.description: Sliding time window in seconds for counting file changes.

cooldown_seconds.description: Minimum seconds between consecutive alerts to avoid noise.
